purpose: Models the terminal rate distribution under discrete AI productivity outcomes
components: Potential 2-3x mispricing in OTM swaption wings (15-20x claim refuted)
current_assessment: Bimodality is structurally real given discrete AI outcomes. OIS curve prices the muddle-through central mode. Valuable as a conceptual tool but specific trade expressions require careful sizing given that uncertain probabilities propagate enormously.
limitations: Treats AI outcomes as discrete when they may be continuous
Swaptions price all macro scenarios, not just AI-conditional
Carry costs of holding convergence positions erode theoretical edge
15-20x mispricing claim refuted — 2-3x is upper bound
